name: Low-Fat Crab Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, dice, and cook potatoes separately.
2. Melt margarine in a 6-quart pan over medium heat.
3. Add onion and green pepper; cook for about 4 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Stir in flour and cook for 1 minute.
5. Gradually add milk using a whisk to prevent lumps and blend the sauce.
6. Incorporate corn, salt, thyme, and pepper.
7. Reduce heat to low and simmer until hot but not bubbling.
8. Add crab pieces and stir well into the sauce.
9. Stir in potatoes and continue heating until hot but not bubbly.
10. Just before serving, add cooking sherry.
